rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no textual or operational interaction with Educ. Code §28.0071, which governs mathematics training requirements for K-3 teachers. No provision references homestead values or property tax revenue thresholds.
quote: Sec. 28.0071. MATHEMATICS TRAINING FOR KINDERGARTEN THROUGH THIRD GRADE.
_note: No conflict identified; the two provisions address unrelated subject matters.
